evidence: FAIL Live readiness blocked: live_ready=False, checks ok/warn/fail=8/0/1, bot_mode=TRIGGER_LIVE, positions=100
recovery_groups.recovery_action: Inspect fem_contract_live_readiness.json, fix the failing readiness item, then rerun _DAILY\0V_CONTRACT_LIVE_READINESS.bat.
recovery_groups.root_cause: The live readiness light is false, so the bot/runtime state cannot be trusted for current trading.
recovery_groups.title: Restore live readiness

evidence: FAIL Contract validator errors: 123 ERROR breach(es) in current validator output
recovery_groups.recovery_action: Open fem_contract_breaks.json and fem_contract_accountability.json; fix the largest repeated breach group first.
recovery_groups.root_cause: Validator errors mean the Panel -> Score chain still has broken trace links.
recovery_groups.title: Repair explicit lifecycle contract breaks

evidence: WARN Adverse fill slippage warnings: 39 adverse fill warning(s)
FAIL Open exit coverage risk: 0 open unguarded, 2 partial-open trace(s)
recovery_groups.recovery_action: Run fill reconcile, exit-intent backfill, exit reconcile, and realized-result after closed positions settle.
recovery_groups.root_cause: Partial/open exits and adverse fills can make realized edge untrustworthy.
recovery_groups.title: Repair fill and exit reconciliation

evidence: WARN Session provenance dirty-data warning: profile=EXPERIMENT_OPEN_GATES, policy=TAG_AND_QUARANTINE_FROM_NORMAL_SCORES, loosened=20, hard_safety=10, positions=123, context=98785f9175922512

recovery_groups.recovery_action: When the experiment ends, restore permission/health enforcement, rebuild score provenance, and require a fresh normal session.
recovery_groups.root_cause: The system is correctly quarantining open-gate and pre-lock evidence away from normal learning.
recovery_groups.title: Return from experiment profile to normal evidence

recovery_groups.recovery_action: Run decision obligation, live-fire accounting, latency audit, and route readiness after the runtime restart.
recovery_groups.root_cause: Backfilled/inferred decisions are useful for research, but not equivalent to a clean real-time contract link.
recovery_groups.title: Make live picks accountable in real time

evidence: WARN Blocked strategy permissions: 6 strategy permission(s) are blocked by contract failures

recovery_groups.root_cause: Invalid overrides and blocked permissions create ambiguity about whether a panel is allowed, blocked, or track-only.
recovery_groups.title: Clean route policy and permission ambiguity
